title: baeckea serpyllifolia
intro: Baeckea serpyllifolia, also known as the prickly baeckea, is a shrub native to Australia that belongs to the family Myrtaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Baeckea serpyllifolia include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
